steps: Create server/modules/timeline-versions.mod.js following the pattern from server/modules/tasks.mod.js. Import utilities from ../kernel/util.js (bad, need, notFound, id, now, hhmm). Export default module object with name 'timeline-versions', title, version, description, and routes function.

Implement timeline block CRUD: GET /api/timeline (returns all blocks sorted by start), POST /api/timeline (create block with title, start HH:MM, end HH:MM, type string), PATCH /api/timeline/:id (update block fields). Blocks have: id, title, start, end, type, order, createdAt, updatedBy. Only 'management' role can write, 'lead' + 'management' can read.

Implement delay propagation: POST /api/timeline/delay with body { blockId, delayMinutes, reason }. When a block shifts, all subsequent blocks (by start time) shift by the same amount. This creates a new version automatically.

Implement versioning: Every mutation (create/edit/delete block, delay propagation) creates a new version. Store versions as collection 'timeline_versions' with { id, version number, timestamp, blocks (snapshot of all blocks at that point), reason/comment, author }. GET /api/timeline/versions returns version list (id, version, timestamp, author, reason). GET /api/timeline/versions/:id returns full version snapshot with blocks.
Implement version diff: GET /api/timeline/versions/:id1/diff/:id2 returns differences between two versions (added/removed/changed blocks).

Implement freeze: POST /api/timeline/freeze freezes the current version (sets frozen=true in settings/state). When frozen, only management can make emergency changes (must include emergency:true in body). GET /api/timeline should return frozen status.

Create web/js/views/timeline.js following the pattern from web/js/views/kidsday.js. Export async function timelineView({ onCleanup, refresh }). Show: timeline blocks as visual timeline (sorted by time), delay propagation button/form, version history list, freeze/unfreeze toggle. Use imports: h, ic, badge, panel from ../core/dom.js; get, post, patch, act from ../core/api.js; on, store from ../core/store.js; sheet, toast from ../core/ui.js.

Register the timeline view in web/js/shell/desktop.js: Add import for timelineView from '../views/timeline.js'. Add NAV entry in the 'Leitstand' section: { id: 'timeline', label: 'Ablaufplan', icon: 'cal', view: timelineView }.
Add '/js/views/timeline.js' to the SHELL array in web/sw.js for offline caching.

Add comprehensive tests to server/test/smoke.mjs in a new section 'Master-Timeline-Versionierung'. Test: create blocks, read them, delay propagation, version creation, version list, version diff, freeze/unfreeze, role restrictions (actor cannot write, lead can read).
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/timeline creates a new block and auto-creates a version
PATCH /api/timeline/:id updates a block and auto-creates a version
POST /api/timeline/delay shifts the target block and all subsequent blocks, creates a version with reason
POST /api/timeline/freeze freezes the timeline, subsequent edits require emergency:true
GET /api/timeline/versions lists all versions with metadata
GET /api/timeline/versions/:id1/diff/:id2 returns the diff between two versions
Only management can write, lead+management can read, actor gets 403
Frontend view renders timeline blocks and version history
Navigation entry appears in desktop shell under Leitstand section
Service Worker cache includes the new view file
All existing 190 tests continue to pass
verification: Run 'npm test' and confirm all tests pass including new timeline versioning tests
